CustomField.description: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This formula indicates whether this file is considered a Household of Color. It will show "Yes" if file's Race is something other than White, or Ethnicity is Hispanic. Based on the Ethnicity and Race fields on the Service File, not Household Members.
CustomField.formula: IF((!ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Race__c , "White") && !ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Race__c , "Chose Not to Respond") && !ISBLANK(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Race__c))) || ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Ethnicity__c, "Hispanic"), "Yes", IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Race__c)) || ISBLANK(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Ethnicity__c)) || ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Race__c , "Chose Not to Respond") || ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Ethnicity__c , "Chose Not to Respond"), "Insufficient Data", "No"))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula indicates whether this file is considered a Household of Color. It will show "Yes" if file's Race is something other than White, or Ethnicity is Hispanic. Based on the Ethnicity and Race fields on the Service File, not Household Members.
CustomField.label: Household of Color
